mapper.sql: select customer_id, enterprise_name, credit_code, establish_date, registered_capital, enterprise_type, industry, tenant_type, business_scope, registered_address, equity_structure, organization_structure, main_business, last_year_revenue, major_clients, major_illegal_flag, dishonest_flag, industry_penalty_flag, carrier_types, intent_area, usage_purpose, lease_term_years, lease_term_label, decoration_requirement, supporting_needs, scale, migration_place, migration_reason, contact_name, approval_contact_name, bill_contact_name, contract_signer, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_position, channel, third_party_channel_name, identity_front_url, identity_back_url, address, cooperation_level, settlement_status, tenant_entry_process_ins_id, tenant_entry_status, tenant_entry_current_node, tenant_entry_approval_pdf_url, tenant_entry_approval_time, status, wx_openid, wx_unionid, remark, verify_status, verify_message, verify_time, industry_access_result, industry_access_reason, risk_level, risk_summary, legal_risk_flag, executive_risk_flag, shareholder_risk_flag, del_flag, park_id, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time from biz_customer
mapper.select: order by create_time desc, customer_id desc
order by create_time desc, customer_id desc

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when settlement_status = 3 then 1 else 0 end) as settledCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as normalCount, sum(case when create_time >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-01') then 1 else 0 end) as monthNewCount from biz_customer
select id, park_id as parkId, name from ics_park where coalesce(status, '0') = '0' order by id asc
select customer_id from biz_customer where credit_code = #{creditCode} and del_flag = '0' order by customer_id asc limit 1
select count(1) from information_schema.tables where table_schema = database() and table_name = #{tableName}
select count(1) from biz_business_opportunity where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from biz_approval_project where customer_id = #{customerId} and coalesce(del_flag, '0') = '0' and process_status != '9'
select count(1) from biz_contract where customer_id = #{customerId} and coalesce(del_flag, '0') = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into biz_customer ( enterprise_name, credit_code, establish_date, registered_capital, enterprise_type, industry, tenant_type, business_scope, registered_address, equity_structure, organization_structure, main_business, last_year_revenue, major_clients, major_illegal_flag, dishonest_flag, industry_penalty_flag, carrier_types, intent_area, usage_purpose, lease_term_years, lease_term_label, decoration_requirement, supporting_needs, scale, migration_place, migration_reason, contact_name, approval_contact_name, bill_contact_name, contract_signer, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_position, channel, third_party_channel_name, identity_front_url, identity_back_url, address, cooperation_level, settlement_status, status, wx_openid, wx_unionid, remark, verify_status, verify_message, tenant_entry_process_ins_id, tenant_entry_status, tenant_entry_current_node, tenant_entry_approval_pdf_url, tenant_entry_approval_time, verify_time, industry_access_result, industry_access_reason, risk_level, risk_summary, legal_risk_flag, executive_risk_flag, shareholder_risk_flag, del_flag, park_id, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{enterpriseName}, #{creditCode}, #{establishDate}, #{registeredCapital}, #{enterpriseType}, #{industry}, #{tenantType}, #{businessScope}, #{registeredAddress}, #{equityStructure}, #{organizationStructure}, #{mainBusiness}, #{lastYearRevenue}, #{majorClients}, #{majorIllegalFlag}, #{dishonestFlag}, #{industryPenaltyFlag}, #{carrierTypes}, #{intentArea}, #{usagePurpose}, #{leaseTermYears}, #{leaseTermLabel}, #{decorationRequirement}, #{supportingNeeds}, #{scale}, #{migrationPlace}, #{migrationReason}, #{contactName}, #{approvalContactName}, #{billContactName}, #{contractSigner}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPosition}, #{channel}, #{thirdPartyChannelName}, #{identityFrontUrl}, #{identityBackUrl}, #{address}, #{cooperationLevel}, #{settlementStatus}, #{status}, #{wxOpenid}, #{wxUnionid}, #{remark}, #{verifyStatus}, #{verifyMessage}, #{tenantEntryProcessInsId}, #{tenantEntryStatus}, #{tenantEntryCurrentNode}, #{tenantEntryApprovalPdfUrl}, #{tenantEntryApprovalTime}, #{verifyTime}, #{industryAccessResult}, #{industryAccessReason}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskSummary}, #{legalRiskFlag}, #{executiveRiskFlag}, #{shareholderRiskFlag}, #{delFlag}, #{parkId}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: update biz_customer set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'

update biz_customer set verify_status = #{verifyStatus}, verify_message = #{verifyMessage}, verify_time = #{verifyTime}, industry_access_result = #{industryAccessResult}, industry_access_reason = #{industryAccessReason}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, risk_summary = #{riskSummary}, legal_risk_flag = #{legalRiskFlag}, executive_risk_flag = #{executiveRiskFlag}, shareholder_risk_flag = #{shareholderRiskFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'
update biz_business_opportunity set enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'

update biz_approval_project set enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, project_name = case when business_type = 'tenant_entry' then concat(#{enterpriseName}, ' 入驻审核') else project_name end, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where customer_id = #{customerId} and coalesce(del_flag, '0') = '0'

update biz_customer set del_flag = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where customer_id in
#{id}
update biz_approval_project set customer_id = #{customerId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where project_id = #{projectId} and coalesce(del_flag, '0') = '0'

update biz_customer
tenant_entry_process_ins_id = #{processInsId}, tenant_entry_status = #{status}, tenant_entry_current_node = #{currentNode}, tenant_entry_approval_pdf_url = #{approvalPdfUrl}, tenant_entry_approval_time = #{approvalTime}, settlement_status = #{settlementStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'
